summary: AgriSmart Terminal Phase 3 (Iteration 112) - Branch Transfer Terminal Integration. All features tested and working. Complete testing of: send-to-terminal for transfers, 423 lock response, terminal-receive with matching quantities, terminal-receive with variance (received_pending), cancel locked transfer blocked, Terminal Transfers page UI.

backend_api_tests.send_to_terminal_requires_sent_status: PASS - Only 'sent' status transfers can be sent to terminal
backend_api_tests.terminal_receive_matching_quantities: PASS - terminal-receive with matching quantities → status 'received'
backend_api_tests.terminal_receive_with_shortage: PASS - terminal-receive with shortage → status 'received_pending' with variance
backend_api_tests.terminal_receive_requires_status: PASS - terminal-receive requires sent or sent_to_terminal status
backend_api_tests.transfer_list_includes_sent_to_terminal: PASS - Transfer list shows sent_to_terminal status
backend_api_tests.transfer_filter_by_sent_to_terminal: PASS - Can filter transfers by sent_to_terminal status
backend_api_tests.normal_transfer_receive_no_regression: PASS - Non-terminal transfers can still be received normally
backend_api_tests.po_send_to_terminal_no_regression: PASS - PO send-to-terminal from Phase 2 still works
backend_api_tests.terminal_pairing_no_regression: PASS - Terminal pairing from Phase 1 still works
backend_api_tests.cancel_draft_transfer_no_regression: PASS - Can still cancel draft transfers
backend_api_tests.cancel_sent_transfer_no_regression: PASS - Can still cancel sent transfers

frontend_ui_tests.branch_transfer_page_loads: PASS - Branch Transfers page loads with History tab
frontend_ui_tests.on_terminal_badges: PASS - Found 33 'On Terminal' badges for sent_to_terminal transfers
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_verified_badges: PASS - 'Terminal' badges visible for terminal-received transfers
frontend_ui_tests.send_to_terminal_buttons_visible: PASS - Send to Terminal buttons visible for 'sent' status transfers (in action column)
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_shell_loads: PASS - Terminal shell loads after pairing with Sales/PO Check/Transfers tabs
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_transfers_tab: PASS - Transfers tab shows 'Incoming Transfers' header
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_transfers_list: PASS - Found 6 transfer items with 'For Checking' badges
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_transfer_detail: PASS - Transfer detail dialog shows order number, product info, pricing
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_transfer_pricing: PASS - Capital (₱120.00) and Retail (₱150.00) prices displayed
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_transfer_qty_input: PASS - Received quantity input field present
frontend_ui_tests.terminal_variance_instruction: PASS - Info banner: 'If quantities don't match, source branch will be notified'

verified_features: POST /api/branch-transfers/{id}/receive returns 423 when transfer is sent_to_terminal (locked)
DELETE /api/branch-transfers/{id} fails when status is sent_to_terminal (locked)
Branch Transfer page shows 'On Terminal' badge for sent_to_terminal transfers
Branch Transfer page shows 'Terminal' badge for terminal-verified transfers
Terminal Transfers page fetches sent_to_terminal transfers for the paired branch
Terminal Transfers page shows pricing (transfer capital, branch retail)
Terminal Transfers page shows quantity sent vs received input
Terminal Transfers page shows result after receive (success or variance pending)
No regression on existing branch transfer receive flow
critical_code_review_comments: Branch transfer locking implemented correctly - status 'sent_to_terminal' blocks PC receive with 423
Terminal receive delegates to existing receive_transfer with skip_receipt_check=True
Variance detection works: shortage → received_pending, exact match → received
WebSocket notification sent when transfer is sent to terminal (notifies paired terminals)
Frontend Terminal Transfers page correctly filters by to_branch_id and status=sent_to_terminal
Transfer detail shows pricing info (transfer_capital and branch_retail) for financial tracking
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test transfers during testing. Used existing branches (Branch 1, Branch 2). Paired terminals during UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 builds on Phase 2 (iteration_111) and Phase 1 (iteration_110). Key selectors: tab-transfers, terminal-transfers, transfer-item-{id}, transfer-qty-{idx}, receive-transfer-btn, transfer-notes-input, transfer-search-input. Transfer flow: 1) PC creates transfer and sends (draft→sent), 2) PC sends to terminal (POST /send-to-terminal, status→sent_to_terminal), 3) Terminal fetches transfers with status=sent_to_terminal&to_branch_id={branch}, 4) Terminal verifies quantities and calls POST /terminal-receive, 5) If exact match→received, if variance→received_pending (source notified). The 423 lock prevents PC from receiving while terminal is checking. Branch Transfer page shows 'On Terminal' amber badge for sent_to_terminal, 'Terminal' green badge for terminal-verified.
